# Volkswagen MQB Marketplace — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A dedicated online marketplace focused on the Volkswagen MQB (Modularer Querbaukasten) platform — one of VW Group's most widely used modular architectures, shared across brands like VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. The platform serves automotive enthusiasts and owners looking to buy, sell, or trade parts, upgrades, and accessories specifically compatible with MQB-based vehicles, creating a niche community-driven hub for this popular platform.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover elite aftermarket automotive parts for your VW, Audi, Skoda, or SEAT MQB build. Join the ultimate niche hub to buy, sell, and trade performance upgrades today.

### Platform Guide
https://example.com/platform-guide
Dive into the definitive MQB platform guide covering compatibility, generations, and modular secrets across VW Group brands. Unlock smarter aftermarket performance auto parts choices now.

### Community
https://example.com/community
Connect with passionate MQB owners swapping aftermarket automotive parts, sharing Mk7 and Mk8 Golf builds, and fueling a community-driven performance parts scene.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need hard-to-find automotive exterior parts or performance upgrades? Reach our MQB specialist team and get matched with the right aftermarket parts for your build fast.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Volkswagen MQB Marketplace
A dedicated online marketplace focused on the Volkswagen MQB (Modularer Querbaukasten) platform — one of VW Group's most widely used modular architectures, shared across brands like VW, Audi, Skoda, and SEAT. The platform serves automotive enthusiasts and owners looking to buy, sell, or trade parts, upgrades, and accessories specifically compatible with MQB-based vehicles, creating a niche community-driven hub for this popular platform.

## Target Audience
- Volkswagen MQB platform vehicle owners and enthusiasts
- Volkswagen MQB Enthusiasts
- DIY Automotive Mechanics
- European Car Tuners

## Industry
Automotive Parts & Accessories

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
